method: deterministic hand-authored grounded in profile.json (no LLM). Each item maps to specific profile fields cited in `rationale`. The operator can flip any expected_tier — the eval re-runs against whatever this file says.

items.rationale: profile.tracks[A].targeted_titles: 'Senior AI Product Manager' + Paris in locations.preferred + CDI in contract_types + names 6 profile skills (LLM, RAG, multi-agent, eval, PRD, GDPR)
items.title: Senior AI Product Manager
items.description: Lead AI product strategy across our LLM platform. Own PRDs, KPIs, evaluation frameworks, and GTM rollout. Strong RAG and multi-agent system experience required. Partner with research and engineering on agentic workflows, prompt engineering, and GDPR-compliant deployments. 7+ yrs PM in AI/ML.

items.rationale: Head of Product (AI) in targeted_titles, Paris, CDI, AI-native scale-up matching Wiser-like proof-points
items.title: Head of Product
items.description: Lead product for our Inference and Spaces business. Own roadmap, strategy, GTM. Drive feature adoption, partner with ML research, build evaluation rigor. RAG, multi-agent, prompt caching, MLOps. Cross-BU alignment with model team. Senior PM background required.

items.rationale: profile.tracks[B].targeted_titles 'AI Automation Specialist' + Freelance in contract_types + names CF Workers + n8n + Claude + Instantly + GHL (5 profile skills) + Paris in preferred
items.title: AI Automation Engineer (Freelance)
items.description: Mission 3 mois TJM 750€. Build outbound automation: Cloudflare Workers + n8n + Claude Code for icebreaker generation + Instantly.ai for sending + GoHighLevel CRM for hot-lead handoff. Cold email at scale, 3-hour SLA on replies. Senior, autonomous.

items.rationale: Fractional AI Builder in targeted_titles + Mission in contract_types + Paris + matches CF Workers + Modal + Claude Code stack
items.title: Fractional AI Engineer
items.description: Fractional / advisory engagement. Ship our AI agent pipeline: Cloudflare Workers + Modal cron + Claude Code + Anthropic API. Builder-led role, autonomous shipping, voice & cold-outbound systems. Mission 4 mois, TJM 700-850.

items.rationale: Senior AI PM CDI Paris at AI-heavy company, names 5+ profile skills including evaluation + multi-agent
items.title: Lead AI Product Manager
items.description: Drive AI products in oncology research platform. Own LLM/multi-agent feature roadmap, evaluation thresholds, non-determinism handling, prompt caching, GDPR + HIPAA compliance. Cross-functional with ML research and clinical advisors. Senior PM with shipped AI products required.

items.rationale: AI Consultant in targeted_titles + Mission + Paris + matches Voice AI + Vapi/Retell + Cal.com profile skills
items.title: AI Consultant — Voice AI Mission
items.description: 6-week mission. Deploy voice AI reception (Vapi or Retell). Integrate with Cal.com for booking, GHL CRM for follow-up. Cold email warm-up via Instantly. Independent contractor, TJM 800. Builder-type framing — ship it, hand over ops.

items.rationale: Senior AI PM CDI remote-EU, AI-native B2B SaaS with RAG and eval focus
items.title: Senior AI Product Manager
items.description: Drive AI search and generative experiences across the platform. Own roadmap, evaluation rubrics, PRD. RAG architecture, multi-agent flows, prompt engineering. Strong cross-BU collaboration with retrieval + ranking teams. EN required, FR plus. 6+ yrs PM, 2+ in AI.

items.rationale: React Native developer (Track B targeted) + Freelance + Paris+remote + Expo/EAS match profile skills
items.title: Freelance React Native + AI Developer
items.description: Build our mobile MVP: Expo + React Native + Claude API + TestFlight pipeline (EAS Cloud Build). 0-to-TestFlight in 14 days target. Builder track, autonomous shipping, TJM 700. Mission length 2-3 months with option to extend.

items.rationale: Senior PM CDI Paris in AI-heavy company with proof-point-style metrics in JD (adoption + latency)
items.title: Senior Product Manager — AI Platform
items.description: Own AI roadmap across booking and clinical assistant. Drive +45% feature adoption, -55% p95 latency targets. Multi-agent flows, RAG over clinical content, evaluation discipline, GDPR + HDS. Senior PM, AI-platform experience, French + English.

items.rationale: AI Builder + Mission/Freelance + matches 7+ profile skills (Modal, Cloudflare, Anthropic, Telegram, Instantly)
items.title: AI Builder — Cold-Email System (Mission)
items.description: Ship a 48k/mo cold-email engine: Apollo lead sourcing, Anthropic API icebreakers, Instantly sending, Telegram 3-hour hot-lead SLA, GHL handoff. Builder track. Mission 3 mois, TJM 750. We need someone who ships, not someone who slide-decks.

items.rationale: Senior PM CDI Paris but NON-AI (B2B SaaS, no LLM/RAG mention)
items.title: Senior Product Manager
items.description: Own roadmap for the payroll platform. Discovery, PRDs, KPIs, GTM. 6+ yrs PM in B2B SaaS. Strong cross-functional collaboration with engineering and CS. French + English.

items.rationale: Freelance Python automation Paris but no Claude/Cloudflare/specific stack mention
items.title: Freelance Python Automation Developer
items.description: Build Python automation scripts to streamline back-office ops. APIs, web scraping, scheduled jobs. Mission 2-3 mois, TJM 500-600.

items.rationale: Senior AI Engineer CDI Paris with strong AI but lacks the PM framing of Track A (engineering-only)
items.title: Senior AI Engineer
items.description: Build production LLM features across our digital experience analytics platform. RAG over user-session data, prompt engineering, evaluation. Strong Python, MLOps. 5+ yrs ML engineering.

items.rationale: Senior PM at AI scale-up but country is Spain (ok_remote 'Schengen' but adds language risk)
items.title: Senior AI Product Manager
items.description: Drive AI roadmap for our marketplace. LLM-powered search, recommendation, agentic delivery routing. Senior PM with AI/ML experience. EN required, ES bonus.

items.rationale: Freelance AI consultant at NON-tech firm (legal) Paris — off-domain but right contract+location
items.title: Freelance AI Consultant — Legal Tech
items.description: Advise our legal practice on AI adoption: document analysis, contract review, knowledge management. 3-month engagement. Senior consultant, AI strategy background. Daily rate negotiable.

items.rationale: Senior PM CDI Paris at AI-tangential company (martech) — adjacent but not AI-native
items.title: Senior Product Manager — Recommendation
items.description: Own the recommendation product across the ad platform. Strong ML literacy required (not necessarily AI/LLM). PRDs, evaluation, GTM. 6+ yrs PM, B2B SaaS.

items.rationale: Freelance AI Engineer Paris — right contract/location but description heavy on infrastructure-only (no Claude/Cloudflare/n8n)
items.title: Freelance AI Engineer — Infra
items.description: Mission 4 mois. Build LLM-serving infra: vLLM, Triton, Kubernetes. Backend Python. Cost optimization. TJM 700-800.

items.rationale: Lead PM at AI-native CDI Berlin — DE risk (Schengen ok_remote, may have EN/FR-only JD assumption)
items.title: Lead AI Product Manager
items.description: Lead AI product across our translation and writing tools. RAG, multi-agent, evaluation. Cross-functional with ML research. EN required, DE optional.

items.rationale: Freelance Voice AI mission Paris but vague stack (no Vapi/Retell named, just generic 'voice')
items.title: Freelance Voice AI Consultant
items.description: Deploy voice agent for front-desk inquiries. Mission 8 weeks. Voice provider TBD. Daily rate 600-700.

items.rationale: Senior PM CDI remote-EU at fintech with light AI surface (recommendations only)
items.title: Senior Product Manager — Personalization
items.description: Own personalization across the SMB banking platform. Recommendation systems, A/B testing, KPIs. Some ML literacy useful but not required. 5+ yrs PM in B2B SaaS.

items.rationale: Cybersecurity Analyst — off-domain (no AI, no PM)
items.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
items.description: Lead our SOC. SIEM tuning, incident response, threat intelligence. CISSP preferred. 5+ yrs cybersecurity.

items.rationale: Junior AI role — junior is in skip_title_substrings + skip_seniority
items.title: Junior AI Product Manager
items.description: Entry-level PM role for new graduates. AI Product Management Junior — 0-2 yrs experience. Training program included.

items.rationale: Senior PM in New York — US is in blocked_countries

items.rationale: Senior PM in Bangalore — APAC is in blocked_countries

items.rationale: German-only JD — language hard filter (Wir suchen prefix)
items.title: Senior AI Product Manager
items.description: Wir suchen einen erfahrenen AI Product Manager für unser Berliner Büro. Verantwortlich für LLM-Produkte. Deutsche Muttersprache erforderlich, Englisch fließend.

items.rationale: Comptable / Accountant — off-domain (off-skill, off-track)
items.title: Chief Accounting Officer
items.description: Lead our accounting team. IFRS, statutory reporting, audit coordination. 10+ yrs in finance leadership. CPA / DSCG required.

items.rationale: Chef de Projet — chef de projet is in anti_titles + hard_filters.skip_title_substrings
items.title: Chef de Projet Digital
items.description: Pilote des projets digitaux clients de bout en bout. Gestion d'équipe, planning, budget. 5 ans d'expérience en agence.

items.rationale: Marketing PM at luxury brand — off-skill (no AI, no software product)
items.title: Marketing Product Manager

items.rationale: Power BI / Tableau data analyst — off-skill (no AI, no product surface)
